mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit t WHERE t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit t WHERE t.status = #{status} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_audit WHERE audit_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_audit ( audit_id, plan_id, audit_name, audit_type, target_dept, auditor_name, auditor_dept, audit_start_date, audit_end_date, total_checklist, completed_checklist, finding_count, status, summary, notes, plan_approver_user_id, plan_approver_team, plan_approver_position, plan_approver_name, completion_approver_user_id, completion_approver_team, completion_approver_position, completion_approver_name, created_by_user_id, created_by_name, created_by_team, created_by_position, modified_by_user_id, modified_by_name, modified_by_team, modified_by_position, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{auditId}, #{planId}, #{auditName}, #{auditType}, #{targetDept}, #{auditorName}, #{auditorDept}, #{auditStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{auditEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{totalChecklist}, #{completedChecklist}, #{findingCount}, #{status}, #{summary}, #{notes}, #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planApproverTeam}, #{planApproverPosition}, #{planApproverName}, #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{completionApproverTeam}, #{completionApproverPosition}, #{completionApproverName}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, #{createdByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdByName}, #{createdByTeam}, #{createdByPosition}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_audit SET audit_name = #{auditName}, audit_type = #{auditType}, target_dept = #{targetDept}, auditor_name = #{auditorName}, auditor_dept = #{auditorDept}, audit_start_date = #{auditStartDate,jdbcType=DATE}, audit_end_date = #{auditEndDate,jdbcType=DATE}, total_checklist = #{totalChecklist}, completed_checklist = #{completedChecklist}, finding_count = #{findingCount}, status = #{status}, summary = #{summary}, notes = #{notes}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, plan_approver_user_id = #{planApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_approver_team = #{planApproverTeam}, plan_approver_position = #{planApproverPosition}, plan_approver_name = #{planApproverName}, completion_approver_user_id = #{completionApproverUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, completion_approver_team = #{completionApproverTeam}, completion_approver_position = #{completionApproverPosition}, completion_approver_name = #{completionApproverName}, modified_by_user_id = #{modifiedByUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, modified_by_name = #{modifiedByName}, modified_by_team = #{modifiedByTeam}, modified_by_position = #{modifiedByPosition}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit SET status = 'COMPLETED', completion_approved_by = #{approvedBy}, completion_approved_at = GETDATE(), reject_reason = NULL, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit SET status = 'IN_PROGRESS', completion_approved_by = NULL, completion_approved_at = NULL, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_audit SET total_checklist = #{totalChecklist}, completed_checklist = #{completedChecklist}, finding_count = #{findingCount}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_audit t WHERE t.plan_id = #{planId} AND t.deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE a SET total_checklist = ISNULL(c.total, 0), completed_checklist = ISNULL(c.completed, 0), finding_count = ISNULL(c.findings, 0), modified_at = GETDATE() FROM tb_audit a INNER JOIN tb_audit_plan ap ON ap.id = a.plan_id OUTER APPLY ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN ci.check_result IS NOT NULL AND LEN(ci.check_result) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN ci.check_result = 'FAIL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS findings FROM tb_checklist_item ci INNER JOIN tb_checklist_category cc ON cc.id = ci.category_id WHERE cc.template_id = ap.checklist_template_id ) c WHERE a.deleted = 0
